name: playwright-recruitment-project
description: Playwright automation framework for recruitment showcasing UI and API testing capabilities

scripts.test:login: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test tests/login/loginTest.spec.ts --project=Chrome
scripts.test:api: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test tests/api/
scripts.test:db: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test DB.test.ts --project=DB
scripts.test:visual: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test visualComparision.test.ts --project=Chrome
scripts.test:device: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test Emulation.test.ts --project=Device
scripts.test:accessibility: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test Axe.test.ts --project=Chrome

author: Cecilia986
